REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-09-2005 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-04-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 218
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SMITH, LAWRENCE T. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 875 POST STREET #125 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL MAY-31-2005, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES WAIVED SO LONG AS DEFENDANT LAWRENCE T. SMITH VACATES BY 5:00 P.M. ON 5/31/05. IF NOT, AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR UNPAID BACK RENT OF $1,974.00 AND UNLAWFUL DETAINER DAMAGES OF $21.93 PER DAY FROM 4/1/05 TO 5/31/05. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION FILED WITH THE COURT. JPT WILL CHEN; D. CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED.
MINUTES FOR MAY-04-2005 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-09-2005 - CASE SETTLED BY WRITTEN STIPULATED JUDGMENT FILED WITH THE COURT. JPT WILL CHEN; D. CARTER, CLERK; NOT REPORTED.
